Devotion in Red

01 Print Available

Devotion in Red

Love isn't always soft. Sometimes, it's painted in red.

A devotion that consumes. A love that lingers long after it's gone. She gave too much of herself. More than anyone asked for. What remains is raw. Unfinished. Unapologetic. Still holding on. Still feeling it all.

Charcoal × Acrylic18 × 24″Limited Edition Print

Cold Press Bright · Fine Art Paper

With You As My Witness
02 / 05
02 Print Available

With You As My Witness

Everything I didn't say, my eyes already did.

Three states. Endless interpretations. They watched. They remembered. They held it all in. These eyes carry the moments I couldn't explain. My truth. Unfiltered. Unspoken.

Charcoal × Acrylic18 × 24″Limited Edition Print

Safe Haven
03 / 05
03 Print Available

Safe Haven

The place that was supposed to protect you can be the first thing to burn.

Some places hold you. Some places hollow you out. You called it home. You built your walls around it. But safety was never guaranteed. Sometimes the fire starts from the inside. There is no safe haven. Only what you rebuild from the ash.

Oil Pastel18 × 24″Limited Edition Print

Cold Press Bright · Fine Art Paper

Fragile

Handle with care. Always.

Some things are too important to break. This preserved heart serves as a reminder of what's delicate, what's real, and what must be protected at all costs. Not everything can be fixed once it's broken.

Write Off
05 / 05
05 Original — One of One

Write Off

Some things burn so the rest can move on.

A final entry. A closed chapter. A lesson written in flames. It's not about regret. It's about recognizing what no longer serves you. You can't keep driving something that's already burning. It's time to write it off.

The Artist

Raw.
Real.
Unapologetic.

RiRi Studios is a Toronto-based art practice rooted in surrealism, emotion, and the things we don’t say out loud. Each piece is born from lived experience — painted, felt, and released into the world for those who are ready to feel it too.

The Handle With Care collection explores five emotional truths: devotion, witness, belonging, fragility, and release. Together they form a single, unbroken confession.

Refund & Return Policy

Prints

All prints are made to order. Due to the custom nature of each piece, we do not accept returns or offer refunds unless the item arrives damaged or defective.

If your print arrives damaged, contact us within 7 days of delivery at arianna@riristudios.com with a photo and we will work to find a resolution.

Originals

All original artwork sales are final. No returns or exchanges.

Shipping

We are not responsible for delays caused by the carrier. If your order is lost in transit, contact us and we will work to resolve it.

Flat rate shipping: $7.50 CAD within Canada.

Contact

For any questions please reach out at arianna@riristudios.com and we will respond within 48 hours.

Canvas Print Inquiry

Interested in a canvas print? Send us a message and we’ll get back to you within 48 hours with pricing and details.

Please include your desired canvas size — custom sizes are available. We’ll reply with pricing and turnaround time within 48 hours.
